name: Western Beans & Rice (Usa Rice)
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Cooked or canned pinto beans
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, heat the vegetable oil over medium heat.
2. Add the chopped onions and sliced celery. Cook until the onions are tender.
3. Stir in the tomato sauce, water, salt, hot pepper sauce (adjust to taste), and beans. Mix well.
4. Heat the mixture thoroughly until all ingredients are evenly heated.
5. Serve the bean and rice mixture over hot cooked brown rice.
Each serving provides:  270 calories  10.6 g. protein  3.3 g. fat  50.5 g. carbohydrate  270 mg. sodium  0 mg. cholesterol
Source: Brown Rice Reprinted with permission from The USA Rice Council Electronic format courtesy of Karen Mintzias
